cause_analysis.narrative: Erase the waist churned on 2026-02-05 after 182 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 24-day silence starting 2025-12-24. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 7 times, but the client only replied 0. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

messages.body: Subject: Hi Erase the Waist quick thought\n\nBody: Hi Erase the Waist So I tried reaching you yesterday, and honestly? I went full detective mode researching your business. (Don't worry, it was the professional kind of stalking.) Here's what I found: This week alone, 8,240 people in Conshohocken searched for exactly wh…
I hear you Tashia, and I appreciate your patience with this. Let me reach out to my client experience lead and I'm sure we can work something out.
I need to cancel
Hey Tashia,  I hope you are doing well.
It’s not you guys i start nursing school to go into Botox and filler that’s all i have no time for clients rn
Before we proceed with the cancellation, I'd love to hop on a brief call with you today if you're available. I want to make sure we've addressed everything on your end. What time works best for you?

Hey Tashia, I hope you are well!  Have you had the opportunity to review the report? I would very much appreciate the chance to connect with you at your earliest convenience to discuss strategies, exchange ideas, gather your feedback, and establish a clear action plan moving forward.

Hello. Please state your name after the tone and Google Voice will try to connect you. Come on. The Google subscriber you have called is not available. Please leave a message after the tone.

This is Kanak, Senior Growth Strategist at Zoca. I've been reviewing your account over the past two weeks and put together a detailed performance report that I just sent over email. It covers everything about how Discovery Agent has been doing with us.
Hey Tashia,  How have you been?

Once you've had a chance to look through it, I'd love to connect and hear your thoughts. We can exchange ideas, discuss strategies, and figure out the best plan moving forward together.  You can grab a time that works for you here: [https://calendly.com/kanak-s-zoca/zoca-call?utm_term=62146&utm_content=3696](https://ca…

My name is Kanak, and I am the Senior Growth Specialist at Zoca. I have been monitoring your account for the past 10 days and have created a performance report based on my insights.
When you get a moment to review it, let me know a good time for us to talk. I'll walk you through everything so it makes complete sense.
Let's make Q1 really strong for your business.
Looking forward to connecting!
